title: Trump says Powell investigation ‘not dropped’
shortDescription: The DOJ dropped its criminal investigation into the Federal Reserve and its chair, Jerome Powell, but President Trump says the probe is "not dropped."

title: What will Trump do at White House press dinner? Updates
shortDescription: Donald Trump is attending the White House Correspondents’ dinner for the first time in more than a decade, and his first time ever as president.

title: Trump cancels US delegation trip for Iran negotiations
shortDescription: Top U.S. and Iranian peace negotiators will not speak in Pakistan over the weekend, with President Trump telling his delegation not to make the trip.

title: New details emerge for King Charles’ White House visit
shortDescription: The White House revealed new details for King Charles’ upcoming U.S. visit. Find out what’s planned during the four-day royal trip.

title: These young, straight White Dems are punching down at Trump supporters
shortDescription: These influencers stoke online backlash and invite criticism from the right while charming casual fans and Democratic loyalists.

title: Democrats try to blunt Trump in Cuba
shortDescription: Democrats in Congress are scrambling to stop President Donald Trump from taking military action in Cuba after a U.S. ultimatum.

title: King Charles hopes to mend rift with US and Trump. Can he?
shortDescription: Britain's King Charles will try to charm President Donald Trump amid tensions over Iran, tariffs and NATO.

title: Hegseth calls war in Iran a 'gift to the world'
shortDescription: During a news conference on April 24, Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth called the U.S. war in Iran a “gift to the world.”

title: Trump still has confidence in Kash Patel, White House says
shortDescription: The White House says Trump still has confidence in FBI Director Kash Patel, who has faced scrutiny over allegations of excessive drinking.

title: Trump says he'll be looking into banks regarding LA wildfires
shortDescription: The president singled out Wells Fargo, saying his administration would look into banks over payments and debt treatment after the wildfires.

title: See what Trump said about royals, the UK before anticipated visit
shortDescription: King Charles III and Queen Camilla are set to visit the U.S. and the president next week amid rising tensions around the Iran war.

title: Miniature White House beehive on South Lawn
shortDescription: The White House adds a miniature beehive on the South Lawn to boost honey production and pollination.

title: Meet the White House’s newest resident: a beehive
shortDescription: The White House unveiled a beehive on the grounds, shaped like a miniature version of the presidential residence. Here's what the honey is used for.

title: Trump says Prince Harry is 'not speaking for the UK' over Ukraine comment
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was speaking to reporters when asked about Prince Harry's call for American leadership to do more about Ukraine. What did he say?

title: Here's the kicker. NFL folks are running for Congress.
shortDescription: The wife of Super Bowl champion Plaxico Burress and ex-sideline reporter Michele Tafoya are among candidates with NFL ties running for Congress.

title: Trump: ‘I’m speaking for the UK more than Prince Harry’
shortDescription: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday (April 23) said Britain's Prince Harry was 'not speaking for the UK' after a reporter asked about Harry's plea to the U.S. to end the Ukraine war.

title: Does gerrymandering risk disenfranchising some voters?
shortDescription: A total of seven states now have new congressional district maps. Will Florida give the advantage to Republicans?
